en.text: from G4862 and a derivative of a compound of G0719 and G3004 (in its original sense of laying); to render close-jointed together, i.e. organize compactly

senses.gloss_en: from G4862 and a derivative of a compound of G0719 and G3004 (in its original sense of laying); to render close-jointed together, i.e. organize compactly
